datasets.name: summary_threshold_gc
queryLines:
WITH user_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS total_sessions
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
      :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
      OR workspace_id IN (
        SELECT
          workspace_id
        FROM
          system.access.workspaces_latest
        WHERE
          workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
      )
    )
  GROUP BY
    user_email
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN total_sessions >= CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 'heavy'
    WHEN total_sessions >= CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 'moderate'
    ELSE 'light'
  END AS threshold_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS users
FROM
  user_sessions
GROUP BY
  1
ORDER BY
  CASE threshold_bucket
    WHEN 'light' THEN 1
    WHEN 'moderate' THEN 2
    WHEN 'heavy' THEN 3
  END

datasets.name: summary_monthly_gs
queryLines:
SELECT
  usage_month,
  MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
  MEASURE(question_count) AS questions
FROM
  fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
WHERE(
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)GROUP BY
  usage_month
ORDER BY
  usage_month

WHERE(

    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)GROUP BY
  usage_month
ORDER BY
  usage_month

datasets.name: summary_threshold_gs
queryLines:
WITH user_questions AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count) AS total_questions
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
      :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
      OR workspace_id IN (
        SELECT
          workspace_id
        FROM
          system.access.workspaces_latest
        WHERE
          workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
      )
    )
  GROUP BY
    user_email
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN total_questions >= CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 'heavy'
    WHEN total_questions >= CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 'moderate'
    ELSE 'light'
  END AS threshold_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS users
FROM
  user_questions
GROUP BY
  1
ORDER BY
  CASE threshold_bucket
    WHEN 'light' THEN 1
    WHEN 'moderate' THEN 2
    WHEN 'heavy' THEN 3
  END

queryLines:

datasets.name: gc_threshold_kpis
queryLines:
WITH cur_agg AS (
  SELECT
    MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS total_sessions,
    MEASURE(genie_code_message_count) AS total_messages,
    MEASURE(avg_messages_per_session) AS avg_msgs_per_session,
    MEASURE(sessions_per_active_user) AS sessions_per_user,
    MEASURE(engaged_minutes) AS engaged_minutes,
    MEASURE(avg_engaged_minutes_per_session) AS avg_engaged_mins
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
),
cur_users AS (
  SELECT user_email, MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS s
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
cur_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN s < CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS light_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s >= CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT) AND s < CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS moderate_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s >= CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS heavy_users
  FROM cur_users
),
prior_agg AS (
  SELECT
    MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS total_sessions,
    MEASURE(genie_code_message_count) AS total_messages,
    MEASURE(avg_messages_per_session) AS avg_msgs_per_session,
    MEASURE(sessions_per_active_user) AS sessions_per_user,
    MEASURE(engaged_minutes) AS engaged_minutes,
    MEASURE(avg_engaged_minutes_per_session) AS avg_engaged_mins
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
),
prior_users AS (
  SELECT user_email, MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS s
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
prior_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN s < CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS light_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s >= CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT) AND s < CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS moderate_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s >= CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS heavy_users
  FROM prior_users
)
SELECT
  ca.active_users, pa.active_users AS active_users_prior,
  ca.total_sessions, pa.total_sessions AS total_sessions_prior,
  ca.total_messages, pa.total_messages AS total_messages_prior,
  ca.avg_msgs_per_session, pa.avg_msgs_per_session AS avg_msgs_per_session_prior,
  ca.sessions_per_user, pa.sessions_per_user AS sessions_per_user_prior,
  ca.engaged_minutes, pa.engaged_minutes AS engaged_minutes_prior,
  ca.avg_engaged_mins, pa.avg_engaged_mins AS avg_engaged_mins_prior,
  cb.light_users, pb.light_users AS light_users_prior,
  cb.moderate_users, pb.moderate_users AS moderate_users_prior,
  cb.heavy_users, pb.heavy_users AS heavy_users_prior,
  ca.total_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_avg,
  pa.total_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_avg_prior,
  ca.total_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_p75,
  pa.total_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_p75_prior
FROM cur_agg ca, cur_buckets cb, prior_agg pa, prior_buckets pb

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit
Genie Code P75 Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: gs_questions_histogram
queryLines:
SELECT
  user_monthly_question_count AS questions_per_user,
  MEASURE(active_users) AS user_count
FROM
  fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
WHERE
  usage_month BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min) AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
  AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
GROUP BY
  user_monthly_question_count
ORDER BY
  questions_per_user

datasets.name: gs_threshold_kpis
queryLines:
WITH cur_agg AS (
  SELECT
    MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
    MEASURE(question_count) AS total_questions,
    MEASURE(active_space_count) AS active_spaces,
    MEASURE(questions_per_active_user) AS questions_per_user,
    MEASURE(ui_questions) AS ui_questions,
    MEASURE(api_questions) AS api_questions,
    MEASURE(genie_spaces_questions) AS genie_spaces_questions,
    MEASURE(onechat_questions) AS onechat_questions,
    MEASURE(mobile_questions) AS mobile_questions
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
),
cur_users AS (
  SELECT user_email, MEASURE(question_count) AS q
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
cur_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN q < CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS light_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q >= CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT) AND q < CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS moderate_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q >= CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS heavy_users
  FROM cur_users
),
prior_agg AS (
  SELECT
    MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
    MEASURE(question_count) AS total_questions,
    MEASURE(active_space_count) AS active_spaces,
    MEASURE(questions_per_active_user) AS questions_per_user,
    MEASURE(ui_questions) AS ui_questions,
    MEASURE(api_questions) AS api_questions,
    MEASURE(genie_spaces_questions) AS genie_spaces_questions,
    MEASURE(onechat_questions) AS onechat_questions,
    MEASURE(mobile_questions) AS mobile_questions
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
),
prior_users AS (
  SELECT user_email, MEASURE(question_count) AS q
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
prior_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN q < CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS light_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q >= CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT) AND q < CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS moderate_users,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q >= CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS heavy_users
  FROM prior_users
)
SELECT
  ca.active_users, pa.active_users AS active_users_prior,
  ca.total_questions, pa.total_questions AS total_questions_prior,
  ca.active_spaces, pa.active_spaces AS active_spaces_prior,
  ca.questions_per_user, pa.questions_per_user AS questions_per_user_prior,
  ca.ui_questions, pa.ui_questions AS ui_questions_prior,
  ca.api_questions, pa.api_questions AS api_questions_prior,
  ca.genie_spaces_questions, pa.genie_spaces_questions AS genie_spaces_questions_prior,
  ca.onechat_questions, pa.onechat_questions AS onechat_questions_prior,
  ca.mobile_questions, pa.mobile_questions AS mobile_questions_prior,
  cb.light_users, pb.light_users AS light_users_prior,
  cb.moderate_users, pb.moderate_users AS moderate_users_prior,
  cb.heavy_users, pb.heavy_users AS heavy_users_prior,
  ca.total_questions * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_avg,
  pa.total_questions * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_avg_prior,
  ca.total_questions * CAST(:genie_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_p75,
  pa.total_questions * CAST(:genie_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS est_cost_p75_prior
FROM cur_agg ca, cur_buckets cb, prior_agg pa, prior_buckets pb

datasets.name: gs_top_users
queryLines:
WITH user_totals AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    workspace_id,
    user_monthly_question_count,
    MEASURE(question_count) AS total_questions,
    MEASURE(ui_questions) AS ui_q,
    MEASURE(api_questions) AS api_q,
    MEASURE(active_space_count) AS spaces_used
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    user_email,
    workspace_id,
    user_monthly_question_count
)
SELECT
  user_email,
  workspace_id,
  SUM(total_questions) AS total_questions,
  SUM(ui_q) AS ui_questions,
  SUM(api_q) AS api_questions,
  SUM(spaces_used) AS spaces_used,
  CASE
    WHEN
      MAX(user_monthly_question_count) >= CAST(:genie_upper_question_threshold AS BIGINT)
    THEN
      'heavy'
    WHEN
      MAX(user_monthly_question_count) >= CAST(:genie_lower_question_threshold AS BIGINT)
    THEN
      'moderate'
    ELSE 'light'
  END AS threshold_bucket,
  SUM(total_questions)
    * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_avg,
  SUM(total_questions)
    * CAST(:genie_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_p75
FROM
  user_totals
GROUP BY
  user_email,
  workspace_id
ORDER BY
  total_questions DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: gs_top_workspaces
queryLines:
SELECT
  workspace_id,
  workspace_name,
  MEASURE(question_count) AS total_questions,
  MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
  MEASURE(active_space_count) AS active_spaces,
  MEASURE(question_count)
    * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_avg
FROM
  fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
WHERE
  usage_month BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min) AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
GROUP BY
  workspace_id,
  workspace_name
ORDER BY
  total_questions DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: gc_top_users
queryLines:
WITH user_totals AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    workspace_id,
    user_monthly_session_count,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS total_sessions,
    MEASURE(genie_code_message_count) AS total_messages,
    MEASURE(engaged_minutes) AS total_engaged_mins
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    user_email,
    workspace_id,
    user_monthly_session_count
)
SELECT
  user_email,
  workspace_id,
  SUM(total_sessions) AS total_sessions,
  SUM(total_messages) AS total_messages,
  ROUND(SUM(total_engaged_mins), 1) AS total_engaged_mins,
  CASE
    WHEN
      MAX(user_monthly_session_count) >= CAST(:genie_code_upper_session_threshold AS BIGINT)
    THEN
      'heavy'
    WHEN
      MAX(user_monthly_session_count) >= CAST(:genie_code_lower_session_threshold AS BIGINT)
    THEN
      'moderate'
    ELSE 'light'
  END AS threshold_bucket,
  SUM(total_sessions)
    * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_avg,
  SUM(total_sessions)
    * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_p75
FROM
  user_totals
GROUP BY
  user_email,
  workspace_id
ORDER BY
  total_sessions DESC
LIMIT 50

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit
Genie Code P75 Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: workspace_lookup
queryLines:
SELECT
  wl.workspace_id,
  wl.workspace_name
FROM
  (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      workspace_id
    FROM
      fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT
      workspace_id
    FROM
      fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  ) w
    INNER JOIN system.access.workspaces_latest wl
      ON wl.workspace_id = w.workspace_id
ORDER BY
  workspace_name

datasets.name: summary_all_users_cost
queryLines:
WITH gc_users AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS gc_sessions,
    MEASURE(genie_code_message_count) AS gc_messages
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    user_email
),
gs_users AS (
  SELECT
    user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count) AS gs_questions,
    MEASURE(ui_questions) AS gs_ui_questions,
    MEASURE(api_questions) AS gs_api_questions
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month BETWEEN
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min)
    AND
      DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    user_email
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) AS user_email,
    COALESCE(gc.gc_sessions, 0) AS gc_sessions,
    COALESCE(gc.gc_messages, 0) AS gc_messages,
    COALESCE(gs.gs_questions, 0) AS gs_questions,
    COALESCE(gs.gs_ui_questions, 0) AS gs_ui_questions,
    COALESCE(gs.gs_api_questions, 0) AS gs_api_questions,
    CASE
      WHEN
        COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%'
      THEN
        CAST(:credit_per_user AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      ELSE 0
    END AS eff_credit
  FROM
    gc_users gc
      FULL OUTER JOIN gs_users gs
        ON gc.user_email = gs.user_email
)
SELECT
  user_email,
  CASE
    WHEN user_email LIKE '%@%' THEN 'Human'
    ELSE 'Service Principal'
  END AS actor_type,
  gc_sessions,
  gc_messages,
  gs_questions,
  gs_ui_questions,
  gs_api_questions,
  gc_sessions
    * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gc_cost_avg,
  gs_questions
    * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gs_cost_avg,
  (
    gc_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      + gs_questions * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
  )
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS total_gross_cost_avg,
  (
    gc_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      + gs_questions * CAST(:genie_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
  )
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS total_gross_cost_p75,
  LEAST(
    (
      gc_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
        + gs_questions * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    )
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))),
    eff_credit
  ) AS credit_consumed_avg,
  GREATEST(
    0,
    (
      gc_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
        + gs_questions * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    )
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      - eff_credit
  ) AS net_cost_avg,
  GREATEST(
    0,
    (
      gc_sessions * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
        + gs_questions * CAST(:genie_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    )
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      - eff_credit
  ) AS net_cost_p75
FROM
  combined
ORDER BY
  total_gross_cost_avg DESC

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit
Genie Code P75 Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: gc_top_workspaces
queryLines:
SELECT
  workspace_id,
  workspace_name,
  MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) AS total_sessions,
  MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users,
  MEASURE(genie_code_message_count) AS total_messages,
  MEASURE(genie_code_session_count)
    * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_avg,
  MEASURE(genie_code_session_count)
    * CAST(:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
    * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
    * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS est_cost_p75
FROM
  fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
WHERE
  usage_month BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.min) AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', :date_range.max)
GROUP BY
  workspace_id,
  workspace_name
ORDER BY
  total_sessions DESC
LIMIT 15

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit
Genie Code P75 Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: summary_cost_kpis
queryLines:
WITH gc_cur AS (
  SELECT user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS gc_gross
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
gs_cur AS (
  SELECT user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count) * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS gs_gross
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE) AND CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
comb_cur AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) AS user_email,
         COALESCE(gc.gc_gross,0) + COALESCE(gs.gs_gross,0) AS total_gross,
         -- service principals (no '@' in identifier, e.g. UUID app IDs) are NOT eligible for the credit
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%'
              THEN CAST(:credit_per_user AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 0 END AS eff_credit
  FROM gc_cur gc FULL OUTER JOIN gs_cur gs ON gc.user_email = gs.user_email
),
agg_cur AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS combined_active_users,
    SUM(total_gross) AS total_gross_avg,
    SUM(LEAST(total_gross, eff_credit)) AS total_credit_consumed,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) AS total_net_avg,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN total_gross > eff_credit THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0.0), 3) AS pct_paid_users,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS avg_net_cost_per_user
  FROM comb_cur
),
gc_prior AS (
  SELECT user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count) * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS gc_gross
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
gs_prior AS (
  SELECT user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count) * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18,6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS gs_gross
  FROM fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN
      DATEADD(DAY, -(DATEDIFF(CAST(:date_range.max AS DATE), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))+1), CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
      AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(:date_range.min AS DATE))
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY user_email
),
comb_prior AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) AS user_email,
         COALESCE(gc.gc_gross,0) + COALESCE(gs.gs_gross,0) AS total_gross,
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%'
              THEN CAST(:credit_per_user AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE 0 END AS eff_credit
  FROM gc_prior gc FULL OUTER JOIN gs_prior gs ON gc.user_email = gs.user_email
),
agg_prior AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS combined_active_users,
    SUM(total_gross) AS total_gross_avg,
    SUM(LEAST(total_gross, eff_credit)) AS total_credit_consumed,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) AS total_net_avg,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN total_gross > eff_credit THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0.0), 3) AS pct_paid_users,
    SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS avg_net_cost_per_user
  FROM comb_prior
)
SELECT
  c.combined_active_users, p.combined_active_users AS combined_active_users_prior,
  c.total_gross_avg, p.total_gross_avg AS total_gross_avg_prior,
  c.total_credit_consumed, p.total_credit_consumed AS total_credit_consumed_prior,
  c.total_net_avg, p.total_net_avg AS total_net_avg_prior,
  c.pct_paid_users, p.pct_paid_users AS pct_paid_users_prior,
  c.avg_net_cost_per_user, p.avg_net_cost_per_user AS avg_net_cost_per_user_prior
FROM agg_cur c, agg_prior p

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: nce_monthly_trend
queryLines:
WITH gc_monthly AS (
  SELECT
    usage_month,
    user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count)
      * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gc_gross
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE(), -12)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    usage_month,
    user_email
),
gs_monthly AS (
  SELECT
    usage_month,
    user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count)
      * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gs_gross
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE(), -12)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    usage_month,
    user_email
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(gc.usage_month, gs.usage_month) AS usage_month,
    COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) AS user_email,
    COALESCE(gc.gc_gross, 0) + COALESCE(gs.gs_gross, 0) AS total_gross,
    CASE
      WHEN
        COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%'
      THEN
        CAST(:credit_per_user AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      ELSE 0
    END AS eff_credit
  FROM
    gc_monthly gc
      FULL OUTER JOIN gs_monthly gs
        ON gc.user_email = gs.user_email
        AND gc.usage_month = gs.usage_month
)
SELECT
  usage_month,
  SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) AS net_cost,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(
      CASE
        WHEN total_gross > eff_credit THEN 1
      END
    )
      / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0.0),
    3
  ) AS pct_paid_users
FROM
  combined
GROUP BY
  usage_month
ORDER BY
  usage_month

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit

datasets.name: gs_questions_by_actor
queryLines:
SELECT
  usage_month,
  actor_type,
  MEASURE(question_count) AS questions,
  MEASURE(active_users) AS active_users
FROM
  fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
WHERE(
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)GROUP BY
  usage_month,
  actor_type
ORDER BY

datasets.name: nce_cost_by_actor
queryLines:
WITH gc_monthly AS (
  SELECT
    usage_month,
    user_email,
    MEASURE(genie_code_session_count)
      * CAST(:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gc_gross
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_code_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE(), -12)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    usage_month,
    user_email
),
gs_monthly AS (
  SELECT
    usage_month,
    user_email,
    MEASURE(question_count)
      * CAST(:genie_avg_cost_per_unit AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      * (1 - CAST(:account_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6)))
      * (1 - CAST(:promo_discount_pct AS DECIMAL(18, 6))) AS gs_gross
  FROM
    fevm_catalog_ippen.genie_analytics.mv_genie_spaces_usage
  WHERE
    usage_month >= ADD_MONTHS(CURRENT_DATE(), -12)
    AND (
  :cross_workspace_mode = 'true'
  OR workspace_id IN (
    SELECT workspace_id FROM system.access.workspaces_latest
    WHERE workspace_name = :workspace_name_filter
  )
)
  GROUP BY
    usage_month,
    user_email
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(gc.usage_month, gs.usage_month) AS usage_month,
    COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) AS user_email,
    COALESCE(gc.gc_gross, 0) + COALESCE(gs.gs_gross, 0) AS total_gross,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%' THEN 'Human'
      ELSE 'Service Principal'
    END AS actor_type,
    CASE
      WHEN
        COALESCE(gc.user_email, gs.user_email) LIKE '%@%'
      THEN
        CAST(:credit_per_user AS DECIMAL(18, 6))
      ELSE 0
    END AS eff_credit
  FROM
    gc_monthly gc
      FULL OUTER JOIN gs_monthly gs
        ON gc.user_email = gs.user_email
        AND gc.usage_month = gs.usage_month
)
SELECT
  usage_month,
  actor_type,
  COUNT(*) AS users,
  SUM(total_gross) AS gross_cost,
  SUM(GREATEST(0, total_gross - eff_credit)) AS net_cost
FROM
  combined
GROUP BY
  usage_month,
  actor_type
ORDER BY
  usage_month,
  actor_type

parameters.displayName: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit

lines:
# Adoption Overview

High-level adoption metrics across Genie Code and Genie. Use the **Genie Code** and **Genie** tabs for deep-dive analysis, threshold segmentation, top users, and workspace breakdowns. See **Net Cost Estimate** for financial metrics.

frame.title: Active Users
frame.description: Distinct users with at least one session.

frame.title: Sessions
frame.description: Sessions, split on a 30-min idle gap. Primary cost unit.

frame.title: Messages
frame.description: Total messages sent.

frame.title: Avg Messages / Session
frame.description: Session depth: messages per session.

frame.title: Sessions / User
frame.description: Sessions per active user.

frame.title: Engaged Minutes
frame.description: Active minutes; gaps over 30 min excluded.

frame.title: Active Users
frame.description: Distinct users who asked a question, across all surfaces.

frame.title: Questions
frame.description: Total questions, all surfaces. Primary cost unit.

frame.title: Active Spaces
frame.description: Distinct Genie Spaces with a question (Spaces only).

frame.title: Questions / User
frame.description: Questions per active user.

frame.title: UI Questions
frame.description: Spaces UI-path questions (heuristic); excludes One and Mobile.

frame.title: API Questions
frame.description: Spaces API-path questions (heuristic); excludes One and Mobile.

frame.title: Threshold Distribution
frame.description: Users by monthly sessions: light < {{ filter:genie_code_lower_session_threshold }}, moderate {{ filter:genie_code_lower_session_threshold }}to {{ filter:genie_code_upper_session_threshold }}, heavy ≥ {{ filter:genie_code_upper_session_threshold }}.

frame.title: Threshold Distribution
frame.description: Users by monthly questions: light < {{ filter:genie_lower_question_threshold }}, moderate {{ filter:genie_lower_question_threshold }}to {{ filter:genie_upper_question_threshold }}, heavy ≥ {{ filter:genie_upper_question_threshold }}.

lines:
## Net Cost Estimate

Cross-workspace financial view. Gross cost is computed per user for the selected workspace and date range. Credit is per user and non-poolable; each user's combined Genie usage is offset by up to the credit amount; any unused credit cannot be redistributed. Trend capped at 12 months.

frame.title: Total Gross Cost
frame.description: Gross cost (GC + Genie) before the ${{ filter:credit_per_user }}credit.

frame.title: Credit Consumed
frame.description: Credit applied (up to ${{ filter:credit_per_user }}/user; service principals excluded).

frame.title: Total Net Cost
frame.description: Billed cost: gross minus the ${{ filter:credit_per_user }}credit, floored at 0.

frame.title: % Paid Users
frame.description: Share of users whose gross exceeds their ${{ filter:credit_per_user }}credit (SPs: any usage).

frame.title: Avg Net Cost per User
frame.description: Net cost divided by active users.

frame.title: Combined Active Users
frame.description: Unique users of any Genie product.

frame.title: All Users – Cross-Product Cost
frame.description: Per-user cost. Credit = ${{ filter:credit_per_user }} (humans) / $0 (service principals); net = gross minus credit.

frame.title: Net Cost & % Paid Users Over Time
frame.description: Monthly net cost, full history (ignores the date filter).

lines: ⚠️ Estimates only. Costs are modeled from assumed per-unit rates, not an official Databricks quote. These are designed to help you understand what the costs could be when the change goes into effect July 6.

This page focuses on session-based Genie Code adoption, engagement, threshold segmentation, and cost estimation. Message-per-session histogram is intentionally deferred until session-level message count is exposed as a metric-view dimension.

frame.title: Light Users
frame.description: Users with fewer than {{ filter:genie_code_lower_session_threshold }}sessions.

frame.title: Moderate Users
frame.description: Users with {{ filter:genie_code_lower_session_threshold }}to {{ filter:genie_code_upper_session_threshold }}sessions.

frame.title: Heavy Users
frame.description: Users with {{ filter:genie_code_upper_session_threshold }}or more sessions.

frame.title: Estimated Cost Avg (Gross)
frame.description: Gross at ${{ filter:genie_code_avg_cost_per_unit }}/session, after discounts. Excludes credit.

frame.title: Estimated Cost P75 (Gross)
frame.description: Gross at the P75 rate (${{ filter:genie_code_p75_cost_per_unit }}/session), after discounts. Excludes credit.

frame.title: Top Genie Code Users
frame.description: Gross cost after discounts; excludes credit. See Net Cost Estimate.

lines: ⚠️ Estimates only. Costs are modeled from assumed per-unit rates, not an official Databricks quote. These are designed to help you understand what the costs could be when the change goes into effect July 6.

frame.title: Genie Code Avg Cost Per Unit
Genie Code P75 Cost Per Unit

lines: This page tracks question-based adoption across all consumer Genie surfaces (formerly known as Genie Spaces, Databricks One, Mobile), including per-surface breakout, threshold segmentation, top users, top workspaces, and cost estimation. UI and API path metrics are Genie Spaces only.

frame.title: UI Questions
frame.description: Genie Spaces only; excludes One and Mobile.

frame.title: API Questions
frame.description: Genie Spaces only; excludes One and Mobile.

frame.title: Light Users
frame.description: Users with fewer than {{ filter:genie_lower_question_threshold }}questions.

frame.title: Moderate Users
frame.description: Users with {{ filter:genie_lower_question_threshold }}to {{ filter:genie_upper_question_threshold }}questions.

frame.title: Heavy Users
frame.description: Users with {{ filter:genie_upper_question_threshold }}or more questions.

frame.title: Estimated Cost Avg (Gross)
frame.description: Gross at {{ filter:genie_avg_cost_per_unit }}/question, after discounts. Excludes credit.

frame.title: Estimated Cost P75 (Gross)
frame.description: Gross at the P75 rate ({{ filter:genie_p75_cost_per_unit }}/question), after discounts. Excludes credit.

frame.title: Top Genie Users
frame.description: Gross cost after discounts; excludes credit. See Net Cost Estimate.

frame.title: Genie Spaces Questions
frame.description: Genie Spaces questions (aibiGenie); excludes One and Mobile.

frame.title: Databricks One Questions
frame.description: Databricks One / One Chat questions. Populates when events appear.

frame.title: Mobile Questions
frame.description: Databricks Mobile questions. Populates when events appear.

lines: ⚠️ Estimates only. Costs are modeled from assumed per-unit rates, not an official Databricks quote. These are designed to help you understand what the costs could be when the change goes into effect July 6.
